about.desc: Yobi builds automation on top of AI web services by driving their web interfaces in a built-in browser window. It does not use the providers' official APIs and does not run a local model. Trigger it with global hotkeys, AgentFlow workflows, schedules, or Telegram, across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Duck.ai.
about.disclosure.title: How Yobi Works
about.stack.intro: This application is powered by the following open-source projects and other third-party software:

agentflow.availableVars.insert: Click to insert into the focused field
agentflow.emptyState: Select a flow or create a new one to get started.

agentflow.generate.description.placehold: e.g. Every weekday at 8am, fetch my RSS feed, summarize it with Gemini, and send it to Telegram
agentflow.generate.done.body: AI created the flow {{name}}. Review and enable it when ready.

agentflow.generate.failed.body: The AI response could not be parsed into a valid flow. Please try again.

agentflow.generate.modal.title: Generate Flow with AI

agentflow.import.file.label: Import from file
agentflow.import.url.error.invalid: The file is not a valid AgentFlow export.

agentflow.skill.bot.attachment.hint: Send a file alongside the message: a local path (e.g. {{file}}) or an image/file URL (e.g. {{rss_1.image}}). The message becomes its caption.
agentflow.skill.bot.chatId.hint: Enter chat IDs (comma-separated). Use negative IDs for groups, or {{bot.triggerChatId}} to reply to the triggering chat.
agentflow.skill.bot.chatId.noPaired: No paired users — pair in Telegram settings or enter a chat ID manually.
agentflow.skill.bot.desc: Push a message to a Telegram chat
agentflow.skill.bot.emitFailFlag.hint: On send failure, set {{<output>.isFailed}}=1 and continue the flow instead of aborting, so a following If can branch on it.
agentflow.skill.bot.message.placeholder: Enter message... use {{variable}} for context values
agentflow.skill.browser.desc: Fetch a full page or article
agentflow.skill.browser.url.error: URL must start with http:// or https://
agentflow.skill.browser_close.hint: Close this tab (or "all" to close every tab this run opened). Tabs also auto-close when the flow ends.
agentflow.skill.browser_js.desc: Fill, click, read or screenshot the page
On error, set {{outputKey}}.isFailed = 1 and continue instead of aborting the flow.
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.fill: set an input / textarea / password value (React-safe)
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.read: text of the first matching element (or empty)
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.readAll: array of text for all matching elements
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.return: Set the output with return <value> (objects become JSON)
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.screensh: save a PNG of the page, return its path
agentflow.skill.browser_js.help.waitFor: wait for the element and return it (default 15s)
agentflow.skill.browser_js.outputHint: What you return (the page content you read) is stored in {{outputKey}}
agentflow.skill.browser_open.desc: Open a live page for automation
agentflow.skill.browser_open.hint: Outputs this tab in {{outputKey}} (plus {{outputKey}}.title / .url). Pass it to an Operate Page step, then close it with Close Page.
agentflow.skill.browser_open.show.hint: Open a visible window (e.g. to sign in manually the first time) instead of in the background.
agentflow.skill.cacheDays.hint: Skip items whose link was already seen within this many days, even if they reappear in the list. Default 3.
agentflow.skill.capture.desc: Capture the primary screen to an image file
agentflow.skill.capture.output.hint: The saved file path is stored in the output variable for use in later steps (e.g., Telegram upload).
agentflow.skill.clipboard.desc: Read from or write to the clipboard
agentflow.skill.comment.hint: This step is for documentation only and does not run.
agentflow.skill.continue.desc: Skip to the next loop item
agentflow.skill.delay.desc: Pause the flow for a set time
agentflow.skill.email_send.hint: Sent via the SMTP account above.
agentflow.skill.email_send.smtp.hint: Shared by all email steps. Stored encrypted on this device — never written into the flow file.
agentflow.skill.email_send.subject: Subject
agentflow.skill.file_delete.hint: Deletes the file (no error if it's already gone). Put it after a send step to clean up a temporary file.
agentflow.skill.file_download.desc: Download a file from a URL to disk
agentflow.skill.file_download.hint: Saved to disk; the path is available as {{file}} for a later bot/email/delete step. 0 = no limit.
agentflow.skill.file_list.desc: List files in a folder (no subfolders)
agentflow.skill.file_list.hint: Outputs {{item.title}} (file name) and {{item.link}} (full path) — feed it into a Loop block.
agentflow.skill.file_read.desc: Read the contents of a local text file
agentflow.skill.file_read.hint: The file contents are stored in the output variable for use in later steps.
agentflow.skill.file_write.desc: Write or append text to a local file
agentflow.skill.file_write.hint: Blank filename auto-generates a unique name (tokens: {date} {time} {rand}). Just writing a file? You're done. To send or delete it afterwards, a later step references {{file}}.
agentflow.skill.http.desc: Call an API and capture the response
agentflow.skill.if.desc: Run a block only when a condition holds
agentflow.skill.if.hint: Runs the steps inside the block only when the condition is true; otherwise they are skipped (until 'End If').
agentflow.skill.includeImage.hint: Also extract the article's cover image (og:image) and expose it as the .image variable.
agentflow.skill.js.hint: Previous step outputs are available as variables by their output key (e.g. {{outputKey}} is the variable outputKey). Use `return` to set this block's output — objects are JSON-stringified. Built-ins available: JSON, Math, Date, fetch, URL, URLSearchParams, Buffer, TextEncoder, TextDecoder, crypto, structuredClone. Runs in-process at the same trust level as the Shell block.
agentflow.skill.llm.desc: Send a prompt to an AI and get a reply
agentflow.skill.llm.emitFailFlag.hint: On timeout/failure, set {{<output>.isFailed}}=1 and continue the flow instead of aborting, so a following If can branch on it.
agentflow.skill.llm.prompt.placeholder: Enter your prompt. Use {{step_id.output}} for variables.
agentflow.skill.llm.useMemory.hint: Loads this flow's saved memory into the prompt and lets the model add to it. Memory persists per flow across runs; the model appends a note only when something is worth remembering.
agentflow.skill.loop.desc: Repeat a block for each item
agentflow.skill.loop.hint: For each item in the input array, binds attributes to variables (like {{var}}) and runs steps inside the loop (until 'End Loop' is encountered).
agentflow.skill.notify.title: Title
agentflow.skill.power.action.hint: The selected action runs immediately on this computer; choose Do nothing to disable the step.
agentflow.skill.power.desc: Shut down, restart, sleep, lock, or sign out
agentflow.skill.power.warning: This closes your apps immediately — unsaved work may be lost.
agentflow.skill.random.desc: Generate random numbers in a range
agentflow.skill.random.hint.multi: Outputs a list — follow with a Loop and use {{item}} for each number.
agentflow.skill.random.hint.single: Outputs one number — use {{outputKey}} directly in the next step.
agentflow.skill.random.unique.hint: Lottery-style — never repeat a number (capped to the range size).
agentflow.skill.rss.desc: Read new entries from a feed
agentflow.skill.rss.discover.hint: Paste a site's home page (or a feed URL) — Yobi finds its feed automatically.
agentflow.skill.rss.discover.notFound: No feed found — paste the feed URL manually.
agentflow.skill.rss.fetchContent.hint: Fetches and merges the full content of each link
agentflow.skill.rss.hint: First run fetches the 5 latest articles. Subsequent runs return only new articles since the last checkpoint.
agentflow.skill.rss.stateActive: Checkpoint stored — next run fetches only new articles
agentflow.skill.rss.url.error: URL must start with http:// or https://
agentflow.skill.run.hint: Launches the program detached and continues immediately — it does not wait or capture output. Arguments support {{variables}}. For shell commands with pipes or redirects, use the Shell block instead.
agentflow.skill.scraper.desc: Grab list items via CSS selectors
agentflow.skill.scraper.hint: First run fetches the N latest items. Subsequent runs return only new items since the last checkpoint.
agentflow.skill.scraper.stateActive: Checkpoint stored — next run fetches only new items
agentflow.skill.scraper.url.error: URL must start with http:// or https://
agentflow.skill.shell.shell.hint: Select the shell interpreter for this step.
agentflow.skill.shell.windowsShell.hint: Select cmd or PowerShell for this step.
agentflow.skill.stock.desc: Get a stock price and metrics
agentflow.skill.stock.symbol.hint: One symbol, or several (comma/newline). US as-is; Taiwan add .TW / .TWO; indices ^TWII. Multiple → no sub-vars.
agentflow.skill.stop.desc: End the flow early when a value is empty
agentflow.skill.stop.hint: Stops the flow gracefully if the value is empty or equals [] — remaining steps are skipped.
Makes an external network request to find your public IP.
agentflow.skill.text.hint: Outputs the text as {{<outputKey>}} for later steps. Sent to a bot step it goes as a message; use file_write to send it as a file.
agentflow.skill.utility.export.content.h: Markdown content to render. Use {{variable}} for dynamic values.
agentflow.skill.utility.export.output.hi: The saved file path is stored in the output variable for use in later steps (e.g., Telegram upload).
agentflow.skill.utility.export.title: Card Title
agentflow.skill.weather.desc: Get current weather for a place
agentflow.skill.youtube.hint: Outputs the transcript ({{<output>}}), the video title ({{<output>.title}}) and a success flag ({{<output>.isFailed}}: 0 = ok, 1 = no captions/failed). Add an If on the flag to branch on success/failure, then an LLM step to summarize.
agentflow.skill.youtube_subs.channels.er: Each line must be an @handle or start with https://
agentflow.skill.youtube_subs.channels.hi: One channel per line — an @handle (e.g. @askvinh) or an https:// channel/feed URL.
agentflow.skill.youtube_subs.hint: Returns NEW videos as {title, link} objects ({{<output>}}); a newly-added channel seeds only its latest video so adding channels never floods. Loop over it, then a YouTube step on {{<loopVar>.link}}.
Exclude YouTube Shorts and keep only regular videos.
agentflow.skill.youtube_subs.stateActive: Checkpoint stored — next run returns only new videos

urlParser.notify.title: Yobi
urlParser.prompt:
Summarize the following web page content into clear, structured key points. Reply directly in Markdown, in English. If the content looks truncated, summarize what's available and note that it may be incomplete.

---
{{cleaned_text}}
---
welcome.hint: Copy any text, press the global hotkey, and {{provider}}'s response will be saved to history and written back to clipboard.
welcome.step.copy: 1. Copy the text you want to process
welcome.step.hotkey: 2. Press the global hotkey ({{hotkey}}) to queue the task
welcome.step.review: 3. Review the result from the history panel
youtube.log.done: ▶️ Transcript fetched ({{chars}} chars) — wrapping summary prompt...
youtube.log.noTranscript: ▶️ No transcript available — handing the video URL to Gemini...
youtube.noTranscript: (No transcript/captions are available for this video. Please watch the video at the URL above and summarize it.)
youtube.prompt.default:
# Task: YouTube Video Summary & Analysis

You are my video summarization assistant. Analyze the YouTube video below using its transcript.

## 📥 Source

- **[Title]**: {{title}}

- **[URL]**: {{url}}

- **[Transcript]**:

---
{{transcript}}
---

## 🎯 Output Requirements (Respond in English)

Skip pleasantries. Output directly in Markdown:

### 1. ⚡ TL;DR

The core message of the video in one or two sentences.

### 2. 📝 Key Points

The main topics, arguments, and takeaways in a logical order (use bullets or a timeline if helpful).

### 3. 💡 Conclusions & Takeaways

The video's conclusion plus any actionable insights for the viewer.

---
⚠️ **Note**: If no transcript is provided, watch the video at the URL above and summarize it directly.
